claims.text: The hyphal context benchmark CLI emits HYPHAL_CONTEXT_FIXTURE_MATCH with equal required evidence-class recovery, equal guardrail recovery, and fewer estimated prompt tokens than the full-context route.
claims.falsification: The benchmark receipt reports a non-matching result, missing required evidence classes, weaker guardrail recovery, or no token reduction.

claims.text: The publication copy states the benchmark as one deterministic fixture and does not claim universal route superiority or measured model answer quality.
claims.falsification: Publication copy presents the fixture as proof that hyphal routing wins generally or as a measured model answer-quality result.

claims.text: The benchmark receipt carries refs, hashes, coverage, and retrieval reasons without embedding raw source bodies or raw context.
claims.falsification: The benchmark receipt includes raw source-body or raw-context payload fields.
